page.content: In the March 2025 report for Electronic Arts in the Asia-Pacific region, the social media DAU/MAU trends reveal notable engagement across various platforms.

lines.text: In the March 2025 report for Electronic Arts in the Asia-Pacific region, the social media DAU/MAU trends reveal notable

page.content: For PlayStation, the Daily Active Users (DAU) stand at 2M, with a Monthly Active Users (MAU) count of 8M, resulting in an Engagement Rate of 15% and User Growth of 10%.

lines.text: For PlayStation, the Daily Active Users (DAU) stand at 2M, with a Monthly Active Users (MAU) count of 8M, resulting in an
Engagement Rate of 15% and User Growth of 10%.

page.content: Xbox shows a DAU of 1.5M and MAU of 6M, with an Engagement Rate of 12% and User Growth of 8%. The PC platform has a DAU of 800K and an MAU of 3M, yielding an Engagement Rate of 10% and User Growth of 5%. Mobile platforms report a DAU of 1.2M and MAU of 4M, achieving an Engagement Rate of 20% and User Growth of 15%. Streaming platforms show a DAU of 500K and MAU of 2M, with an Engagement Rate of 5% and User Growth of 3%. Total metrics indicate a DAU of 5.0M and MAU of 23M, with an overall Engagement Rate of 62% and User Growth of 38%. Specifically for the Asia-Pacific region, DAU is 1M, MAU is 5M, with an Engagement Rate of 30% and User Growth of 18%. In licensing and syndication revenue, the total revenue is JPY15B, of which JPY10B comes from Asia-Pacific. The headcount is 250, with a total of 39 titles. Action Games generate JPY5B, Simulation Games JPY3B, and Sports Games JPY4B, while Role-Playing Games contribute JPY2B.
